hero_subtitle: Nova Path operates a nationwide network of safehouses, resident care programs, and home visitations - restoring dignity, one family at a time.
pillar_safehouse_body: Thirty-four secure locations across 12 states providing immediate shelter, counseling, and long-term housing pathways for families in crisis.
pillar_visitation_body: Trained specialists conduct proactive, compassionate visits to at-risk families - identifying needs before they become emergencies.
pillar_process_body: End-to-end case documentation ensures continuity of care, legal compliance, and transparent reporting to stakeholders and donors.
section_subtitle: Every program is designed to create lasting change - not just immediate relief.
